description: Explicit capability contract for the Panda tabletop pick-and-place system. This file is the first place collaborators should update when adding, renaming, or changing robot-facing actions.

actions.name: get_robot_context
actions.description: Return a read-only runtime observation summary for the MCP/LLM outer loop, including scene freshness, dependency readiness, workspace envelope, recent error, recent events, and recommended next step.

context.description: Scene summary, readiness groups, executor observation, workspace envelope, last_error, recent_events, and recommended_next_step.

preconditions: MCP server has initialized its ROS bridge node
side_effects: None; this action does not trigger perception refresh or robot motion
safety: Does not expose raw coordinates; reports object ids, labels, confidence, freshness, and workspace inclusion

actions.name: scan_scene
actions.description: Trigger one perception refresh and return the currently visible tabletop object ids, labels, and confidences.

objects.description: Visible objects with id, label, and confidence. Coordinates stay inside ROS and are not exposed to the LLM tool output.

preconditions: Gazebo desk camera topics are publishing
side_effects: Refreshes the perception blackboard used by later pick/place actions
safety: Read-only with respect to robot motion
Does not expose raw coordinates to the LLM-facing tool response

actions.name: pick_object
actions.description: Pick up a visible object by semantic object id using MoveIt macro motion, optional visual servoing, and the Franka gripper action interface.

id.description: Object id from scan_scene, for example blue_plate_01.
The requested object id when the action succeeds.

preconditions: scan_scene has recently observed the object id
Object approach pose is inside the workspace envelope
Franka gripper actions are available or allow_gripper_skip is explicitly enabled for demo mode
side_effects: May open and close the gripper
Updates executor held-object bookkeeping on success
safety: Validates target against the workspace envelope before motion

actions.name: place_at
actions.description: Place the currently held object at a semantic offset relative to a visible target object.

target_id.description: Target object id from scan_scene, for example blue_plate_01.

offset.description: Semantic placement offset resolved in panda_link0.

preconditions: A pick_object action has succeeded or the user accepts demo-mode gripper skipping
scan_scene has recently observed the target id
Resolved placement pose is inside the workspace envelope
side_effects: Clears executor held-object bookkeeping on success
safety: Validates offset against the supported semantic offset set
Validates resolved target against the workspace envelope

actions.name: abort_current_task
actions.description: Request preemption of the currently running pick/place task and stop active servo motion.

what.description: The task name reported by the executor, or idle.

side_effects: Publishes zero twist and stops moveit_servo if it was active
safety: Should be called immediately when the user says stop, cancel, or abort
Does not start new arm motion
